reboot.note: Reboot verified: 404/404 green at start, pkg_hash s6-d1f68b matched.

select.note: S6.5 selected. REQ-030 core. Depends S6.1-S6.4 (all COMPLETED).

plan.note: Plan: worked out chapter-grouping input shape (ChapterRecord[]), optimizationDepth from cumulative CoverageMatrix, emotionalState from GDOS's own gate scores, trendWindowLevels->EMA-rate conversion, retentionPrediction's five-component formula, spike detection ordering (compare against baseline BEFORE this chapter folds in, avoiding self-masking). Verified real data shapes (Emotional.ts's gate name 'emotional-threshold', OPTIMIZATION_STYLE_AXIS as an importable value) before coding.

anchor.note: Anchor + ledger: dm-0052 covers all five S6.5 design decisions in one entry (chapter grouping, optimizationDepth source, emotionalState source, trendWindowLevels' new consumer, retentionPrediction normalization). Ledgered BEFORE implementation, closing the third near-miss dead-field risk (trendWindowLevels) by giving it a real formula-backed use.

implement.note: Implemented CampaignDirector.ts (updateState + processCampaign + 7 pure helpers). Added CampaignProfile.trendMagnitudeTolerance (parse+default+rejection). Refined TrendReading's doc comment to lock its magnitude/direction semantics. No TODOs/stubs.

verify.note: npm test: 417/417 green (404 baseline + 13 new: 1 CampaignProfile rejection test + 12 CampaignDirector tests incl. fold determinism, the IRD P6 exit condition's synthetic 3-chapter spike-at-chapter-2 test, retention improving-vs-declining, three two-profile externalization proofs). Hand-traced the EMA math for every assertion before running -- all passed on first execution, confirming the formulas were implemented as designed. npx tsc --noEmit clean. npm run build clean.

integrate.note: PKG: +1 node (eval/campaign/campaign_director), 8 dependency edges (design_space as value_import for OPTIMIZATION_STYLE_AXIS, the rest type_import), both directions. pkg_hash s6-d1f68b -> s6-e7b3a9.

report.note: task_slices.md S6.5 -> COMPLETED. No requirements_backlog.md state change needed -- REQ-030 already IN_PROGRESS from S6.1; flips VERIFIED at S6.6.

handoff.note: Handoff written: pkg_hash s6-e7b3a9. All P6 code complete. S6.6 is the closing slice: verification report, backlog flips, EvalIsolation-scan decision, M2 close.

acceptance.criterion: S6.5 delivers the REQ-030 core: CampaignDirector.processCampaign is a deterministic fold over a chapter-grouped campaign, producing the full CampaignState (all ten REQ-031 variables now genuinely computed, not just typed) plus difficulty-spike alerts and retention prediction. The IRD P6 exit condition (macro state updates deterministically from a fixture campaign; flags a synthetic difficulty spike) is proven by test. REQ-030 stays IN_PROGRESS -- flips VERIFIED at S6.6.
